title: Knysna Rotary tackles e-waste
description: KNYSNA NEWS - In alignment with Rotary...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - In alignment with Rotary International's commitment to environmental protection, the Rotary Club of Knysna has been helping residents dispose of unwanted electronic and electrical goods safely through its popular e-waste collection days.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - In alignment with Rotary International's commitment to environmental protection, the Rotary Club of Knysna has been helping residents dispose of unwanted electronic and electrical goods safely through its popular e-waste collection days."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The first event was piloted in February 2022 and proved so successful that the club's Environmental Committee has continued the initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Recently, the Rotary Club held its 15th e-waste collection day.","html":"Recently, the Rotary Club held its 15th e-waste collection day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rotary Knysna partners with Henque Waste, a George-based waste management company, to ensure all collected items are properly processed.","html":"Rotary Knysna partners with Henque Waste, a George-based waste management company, to ensure all collected items are properly processed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A collection station is set up in the Loerie Park car park, where Rotarians assist with logistics and the Henque team handles sorting and loading onto the recycling truck.","html":"A collection station is set up in the Loerie Park car park, where Rotarians assist with logistics and the Henque team handles sorting and loading onto the recycling truck."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In addition to collecting e-waste, the Rotarians hand out Knysna's official household recycling guide and sell clear recycling bags to encourage residents to make use of the town's weekly recycling collection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although e-Waste Day is a community service project and generates no profit, those dropping off goods are welcome to make a voluntary donation in support of Rotary's broader environmental work.","html":"Although e-Waste Day is a community service project and generates no profit, those dropping off goods are welcome to make a voluntary donation in support of Rotary's broader environmental work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"e-Waste Days are held from 08:30 to 12:00 on the first Saturday of March, June, September and December. Upcoming dates are shared via Rotary Knysna's social media, local newspapers and community WhatsApp groups.","html":"e-Waste Days are held from 08:30 to 12:00 on the first Saturday of March, June, September and December. Upcoming dates are shared via Rotary Knysna's social media, local newspapers and community WhatsApp groups."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Henque truck filling up.","html":"The Henque truck filling up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Recycling bags for sale.","html":"Recycling bags for sale."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
